featureName: BUG-006-005: Governance Baseline Drift (executionHistory, claim arrays, deferral language, commit prefix)

executionHistory.summary: bubbles.gaps trigger probe in sweep-2026-05-24-r10 round 2 identified 4 governance baseline finding classes against parent specs/006-phase5-advanced. Routed to validate-to-doc artifact-only bug packet because all 4 findings are artifact-integrity gaps with no runtime code surface.

Re-ran state-transition-guard on parent specs/006-phase5-advanced after artifact edits. F1 (Gate G040 hits in parent report.md) closed: Check 18 reports zero hits. F2 (phase impersonation) closed: Check 6B confirms all claimed phases have provenance in merged execution.executionHistory. F3 (missing required phases) closed: Check 6 confirms all 12 full-delivery required specialists present in claim arrays. F4 (commit prefix) closes on this remediation commit (Check 17).

Audit confirms only specs/006-phase5-advanced/ paths in staged diff. No production code, test code, config, CI/CD, or docs outside spec folder touched. PII redaction verified (no /home/<user>/... in evidence blocks). artifact-lint and traceability-guard both pass on parent baseline.
Bug packet 6-artifact set created. Parent report.md updated with rewrites of 3 legacy passages. No other docs touched.

Bug closed at validate-to-doc ceiling 'validated'. All DoD items satisfied with file:line evidence. Sweep ledger entry recorded round=2 trigger=gaps mappedMode=gaps-to-doc bugFinalStatus=resolved. Parent spec 006 returns to guard-clean state.

scopeProgress.name: Close All Four Governance Baseline Findings
